case_title: TELEGRAPH HILL, INC. DBA TELEGRAPH HILL ROBES VS. CRESCENT HOTEL GROUP PC, LLC DBA CRESCENT SAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TELEGRAPH HILL, INC. DBA TELEGRAPH HILL ROBES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRESCENT HOTEL GROUP PC, LLC DBA CRESCENT SAN FRANCISCO $3,232.50 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,337.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT.
